languages.text: The user suffers a penalty to Ballistic Skill equal to 10% of its maximum.

traits.locale_text: The user suffers a penalty to Ballistic Skill equal to 10% of its maximum.

languages.text: The user's Ballistic Skill is reduced by −10%.
languages.original_text: The user suffers a penalty to Ballistic Skill equal to 10% of its maximum.

traits.locale_text:
The user suffers a −10% penalty to maximum hit chance while attacking with a weapon in this hand.
While they have {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, this penalty is increased to −30%.

The user suffers a −10% penalty to maximum hit chance while attacking with a weapon in this hand.
While they have {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, this penalty is increased to −30%.
The user's Ballistic Skill is reduced by −10%.
The user's Ballistic Skill is reduced by −10%.

The user suffers a −10% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to maximum {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit chance{/g} while attacking with a weapon in this hand.
While they have a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, this penalty is increased to −30%.

languages.text: Дальний бой обладателя аугмента уменьшен на 10%.
languages.original_text: The user's Ballistic Skill is reduced by −10%.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}штраф{/g} −10% к максимальному {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}шансу попадания{/g} при атаке оружием в этой руке.
Пока у обладателя аугмента {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалечена правая рука{/g}, этот штраф увеличивается до −30%.

Обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}штраф{/g} −10% к максимальному {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}шансу попадания{/g} при атаке оружием в этой руке.
Пока у обладателя аугмента {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалечена правая рука{/g}, этот штраф увеличивается до −30%.
